name: gunmetal-barrage
description: Turn-based 3D artillery game — procedural voxels, tanks, and lobbies

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=@gunmetal-barrage/server & npm run dev --workspace=@gunmetal-barrage/client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@gunmetal-barrage/shared && npm run build --workspace=@gunmetal-barrage/server && npm run build --workspace=@gunmetal-barrage/client
